title: lippia junelliana
intro: Lippia junelliana, also known as yerba de la montaña, is a perennial plant species native to Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Lippia junelliana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused in hot water, and is also used in topical applications, such as creams and ointments, to treat skin conditions and wounds.
